text: Refactor KG Studio into route-backed Overview/Sources/Graph/Review/Draft Lab workspace pages.
New route-backed KG Studio workspace with Overview, Sources, Graph, Review, and Draft Lab pages.
Routes /kg-studio/* into the dedicated workspace and updates KG navigation targets.
Shared frontend value and ID formatting helpers.
Adds focused KG workspace, subnav, overview, graph, review, and draft page styles.
Documents the KG Studio subpage split and non-mutating workflow.
